title: Kidplokio Toddler Indoor Outdoor Toy Golf Caddy Set Kids Golf Ages 3 to 8 - Blue
description:
Learn to play golf just like Dad with the Kidplay Products Kids Red Golf Caddy Set! This children's golf set is a great way to get your child outside for some fun playtime. With the golf clubs and putting cups, your child will learn fine motor skills and hand eye coordination. Watch as your child develops new skills while having fun with this golf-themed pretend play set! Each set comes with 2 practice golf holes, 3 golf balls and 3 different types of clubs.

Kidplokio Toddler Indoor Outdoor Toy Golf Caddy Set Kids Golf Ages 3 to 8 - Red

Enhance your little kid’s imagination with this Happy Golfer Play Set! This golf caddy play set is perfect for your little ones when spending quality time with you or with their friends.

Key Features

  • Kidplokio Pretend Play Golf Caddy Set - Red
  • Golf Club Holder has Wheels for Easy Transportation
  • Comes with 3 Different Types of Golf Clubs
  • Includes 3 Golf Balls & 2 Practice Holes
  • Promotes Development of Hand-eye Coordination & Fine Motor Skills

Product Specifications

  • MPN: KPPPPGS-R
  • UPC: 060886935308
  • Color: Red

It allows your kids to learn and have fun doing a pretend play with these golf tools and accessories. Fun toy-set that promotes interest about the functionality of tools when playing golf. Non-toxic toys that are safe to use and these are perfect add ons for kids workshop, pretend play, and party decorations. Includes 1 golf club holder that features wheel for easy transport, 3 golf balls, 3 types of clubs, and 2 practice holes.

This golf pretend play-set will promote development of child’s hand-eye coordination and fine motor skills. Made of high quality materials that make this toy set strong and sturdy. These can withstand with the bumps and crashes. Durable construction plastic toys that your kids will enjoy and creates a good time playing it outdoor or indoor. Recommended for ages 3 and above.
